highlights.description: `devfolio devx dashboard`: build a DeveloperPeriodReport from the local OmniDevX event store (Claude Code, Codex CLI, git, GitHub) and export it as a dashforge dashboard
MkDocs documentation site, matching the rest of the OmniDevX ecosystem
Contributor profile: local git clone detection with automatic API fallback, multi-stage progress reporting, and a dashforge dashboard export flag

added.description: `devfolio devx dashboard` command: reads the local OmniDevX store, builds a `DeveloperPeriodReport`, exports a portable dashforge dashboard (8 metric tiles, daily activity/cost charts, source-coverage table)

`output/devxdashboard` package: projects a `DeveloperPeriodReport` into `dashforge`'s `dashboardir.Dashboard` type directly (not a local reimplementation), so chart widgets render correctly in dashforge's current viewer
`contributor profile --dashboard`: export a dashforge-compatible dashboard from a contributor profile (chart widgets use an older shape â€” see Documentation)

`contributor profile --api-only`/`--local-path`: local git clone detection (checks `~/go/src/github.com` and configured paths, falls back to the GitHub API) plus multi-stage progress reporting to stderr

MkDocs site: landing page, getting-started walkthrough, command reference for contributor/team/devx, PlexusOne nav override â€” `docs/specs/` (internal ecosystem architecture) deliberately excluded from the built site

changed.description: README: add the missing docs-mkdoc badge, document `devx dashboard`, fix stale links (dashforge pointed at the wrong org twice, license badge pointed at a nonexistent master branch, visualization badge pointed at an unrelated repo) and a stale Go-version/GITHUB_TOKEN requirements claim

dependencies.description: Add `github.com/plexusone/dashforge` v0.3.0 for the dashboardir types
Add `github.com/plexusone/omnidevx-core` v0.2.0 for the report/identity/store packages

Bump `github.com/google/go-github` to v88.0.0, `github.com/grokify/gogithub` to v0.13.0, `github.com/grokify/mogo` to v0.74.6, `github.com/grokify/structured-changelog` to v0.14.1 (routine dependabot updates)

documentation.description: OmniDevX ecosystem spec set (PRD/TRD/PLAN/ROADMAP) distilled from ideation notes into `docs/specs/`, covering the canonical event IR through team unification

TRD Â§7: dashboard-projection architecture â€” the two-artifact export (disclosure-safe data + dashforge dashboard definition), why dashforge over a Grafana/OTel stack, and the VisionStudio consumption boundary

highlights.description: Developer portfolio and team velocity metrics CLI
AI collaboration tracking to measure how AI-native developers are

added.description: `contributor profile` command to generate comprehensive contributor profiles from GitHub activity
Profile types including commits, PRs, issues, reviews, and repository breakdown
GitHub API client for fetching user contributions and activity heatmap data
AI collaboration tracking via `Co-Authored-By` trailer parsing in commit messages
Known AI tools registry: Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Gemini CLI, Cursor, Aider
AI commit statistics including percentage, most-used tool, first AI commit date, and trend
Activity heatmap data for GitHub-style contribution calendars
`team velocity` placeholder command for team metrics

infrastructure.description: GitHub Actions workflows for CI, lint, and SAST via reusable workflows
Dependabot configuration for daily gomod and github-actions updates

documentation.description: Project README with usage examples and feature overview
